text.tspan: Any AI agent that combines all THREE of these capabilities
is at high risk of being weaponized via prompt injection.
Remove ANY ONE of them and the attack class largely collapses.
→ agent reads it via tool call
→ instructions tell agent to read private data (1)
→ instructions tell agent to send data out (3)
• OR human-in-loop gates on any of (1)(2)(3)
